bond(uint256).details: Any pending withdrawal for the caller is canceled before new BUGZ is transferred in.

params.amount: BUGZ amount to transfer from the caller.

params.index: Zero-based index into the bonded address set.

params.limit: Maximum number of addresses to return.

returns._0: Page of bonded addresses. Returns an empty array if `offset` is past the end.

params.initialOwner: Owner that can manage treasury and slashers.

getLevel(address).details: Pending withdrawals are excluded, so moving BUGZ into withdrawal immediately reduces vote power.

returns._0: Voting level. Accounts below 10 active whole BUGZ return zero under this formula.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

requestWithdrawal(uint256).details: Pending withdrawals remain slashable and reset to a fresh seven-day delay on each request.

params.amount: Active BUGZ amount to move into pending withdrawal.

params.allowed: True to allow slashing, false to revoke.

slash(address,uint16).details: Pending withdrawal balance is consumed before active balance. This preserves the anti-exit protection.

params.slashBps: Slash percentage in basis points, where 10,000 is 100%.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

returns._0: Unix timestamp when withdrawal is available, or zero when no withdrawal is pending.

BUGZ_TOKEN_ADDRESS().notice: Live BUGZ ERC20 address on Base.

MAX_SLASH_BPS().notice: Basis-point denominator and maximum slash amount.

WHOLE_BUGZ().notice: One whole BUGZ token in ERC20 base units.

WITHDRAWAL_DELAY().notice: Delay between a withdrawal request and the earliest successful withdrawal.

accountOf(address).notice: Returns the full bond account state.

activeBondOf(address).notice: Returns BUGZ currently active for voting/reputation.

bond(uint256).notice: Bonds BUGZ into the vault as active voting/reputation stake.

bondOf(address).notice: Returns active plus pending BUGZ for an account.

bondedAddressAt(uint256).notice: Returns a bonded address by index.

bondedAddressCount().notice: Returns the number of addresses with nonzero active or pending bond.

bondedAddressList(uint256,uint256).notice: Returns a page of bonded addresses.

bugz().notice: Returns the live BUGZ ERC20 interface.

getLevel(address).notice: Returns floor(log10(active whole BUGZ)) for voting weight.

pendingWithdrawalOf(address).notice: Returns BUGZ queued for delayed withdrawal and still slashable.

requestWithdrawal(uint256).notice: Starts or extends a delayed withdrawal for active BUGZ.

setTreasury(address).notice: Sets the address that receives future slashed BUGZ.

slash(address,uint16).notice: Slashes an account's total bonded exposure and transfers the slashed BUGZ to treasury.

slashers(address).notice: Whether an address is allowed to slash bonded accounts.

withdraw().notice: Withdraws all caller BUGZ that has completed the seven-day delay.

withdrawAvailableAt(address).notice: Returns when an account's pending withdrawal can be claimed.
